objects.label: chair
objects.long_form_open_description: Close-up view (approx. 1.0 m) of a dark brown leather recliner shown in left-side profile; the crop is partial/edge-cropped and includes the padded armrest, sagging seat cushion, creased/wrinkled leather surface and a visible reclining lever on the side. Backrest shows horizontal seam lines and the leather appears worn with surface wrinkles and soft cushioning; chair is angled slightly away from the camera.

objects.label: fireplace
objects.long_form_open_description: Partial close-up of a dark-gray painted fireplace surround with a recessed rectangular firebox opening; interior appears empty and black, surround shows painted texture with slight wear, mantel edge and small objects visible at top-left, and the crop is edge-cut at lower-left.
